name: imdisk
description: Install ImDisk virtual disk driver, mount D: from C:\MAST\Shared\MAST-15GB-indexes-5202+5203.img immediately if the image is present, and register a boot-time task so the mount persists across reboots. Ordered before astrometry (500) so D:\mast-indexes is reachable during astrometry's smoke solve.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${log} = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\imdisk-verify.log'; if (Test-Path 'C:\Windows\System32\imdisk.exe') { 'ImDisk installed successfully' | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\imdisk-smoke.txt') -Value 'imdisk_ok' } else { 'ImDisk executable not found' | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
